Remote asset monitoring for commercial refrigeration

OpSense provides simple and affordable real time monitoring for supermarkets, convenience stores, pharmacies, and other large retailers. The data OpSense collects helps you reduce perishable inventory loss and ensure your equipment operates at peak efficiency. Our customers typically see ROI within months, saving $5,000 to $15,000 per location annually.

How it Works Schedule a Demo

Leading Brands OpSense Protects

  • "The benefits are tremendous. The labor savings justified the solution, but the food safety and quality benefits became our biggest driver for rolling it out across our enterprise."

    Brett Bonner
    Kroger

    Read the Kroger Case Study

  • "OpSense is a critical part of our food safety program and has completely revolutionized how I manage the temperatures at our distribution centers."

    Sean Ferris
    Wakefern

    Read the Wakefern Case Study

  • "OpSense is very easy to use, and works flawlessly. It’s almost impossible to miss a problem. The system has paid for itself ten times over."

    Tim Pifer
    Piggly Wiggly

    Read the Piggly Wiggly Case Study

Around the clock monitoring let’s you see the big picture

Get a complete view of your enterprise by seamlessly connecting your facilities, equipment, and digital workflows with OpSense remote asset monitoring. When all sensor data and third-party platforms are integrated you can track product conditions, leaks, energy consumption and more on one easy-to-use dashboard to make informed decisions with confidence.

  • Remote monitoring for grocery and convenience stores

    OpSense helps supermarkets, convenience stores, and other large retailers ensure freshness and prevent product loss. Effortlessly monitor temperatures and easily generate HACCP-compliant records, ensuring safety and regulatory compliance. Learn More

  • Remote monitoring for pharmacy and healthcare

    Pharmacies, hospitals, and healthcare facilities need to ensure temperature-sensitive vaccines and medicines are stored at the correct temperature around the clock. OpSense automated monitoring and alerting maintains quality control and simplifies FDA and CDC compliance. Learn More

  • Remote monitoring for restaurants and hospitality

    Continuous monitoring helps you meet food safety guidelines such as HACCP and FSMA consistently, rather than costly and error-prone manual record keeping. OpSense is easy to set up and the digital checklists are simple to use. Experience quick ROI while ensuring the freshest food for your customers. Learn More

  • Remote monitoring for food production and processing

    OpSense provides a view of your entire cold chain from refrigerated trucks to cold storage. Ensure food safety compliance by tracking temperatures, location, and environmental conditions in real time. Alerts let you know when temperatures are out of range so you can minimize downtime and maximize confidence in your operation. Learn More

Data from OpSense makes operational excellence achievable

Master regulatory compliance

Maintain historical data and information necessary to support compliance with government and industry regulations.

Monitor more than temperatures

OpSense remote monitoring readily integrates with existing tech and is built for scalability.

Automate processes

Eliminate human error and save hundreds of hours with automated data collection. Redirect staff to more important initiatives.

Quick payback

Significant savings on labor, equipment maintenance, and energy costs within months of adoption.
